parents.subject: LU-17901 tests: fix sanityn test_81a intermittent EIO

commit.subject: LU-18243 lfs: add state option to lfs df --output
commit.message:
LU-18243 lfs: add state option to lfs df --output

Add support for 'state' as a field option to the "lfs
df --output" command allowing users to explicitly request
the os_state field in the output.

This replaces the need for "lfs df | awk" patterns commonly
used in test scripts.

Change-Id: I9d325385d9fb55be387607226a7a21b873873444
Signed-off-by: Chakshu Kansal <ckansal@ddn.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/64408
Reviewed-by: Maximilian Dilger <mdilger@whamcloud.com>

Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
